prompt: Create a cinematic macro fantasy scene in a 16:9 horizontal frame: a delicate pale feminine hand reaches down from the upper left, with exactly 4 visible fingers, the index finger gently touching the center of a luminous glass-like flower. Show exactly 3 main botanical elements: 1 large open crystal flower in sharp focus on the right foreground, 1 softer blurred open crystal flower in the left midground, and 1 small closed crystal bud in the lower right. The flowers have transparent silver-blue petals with fine vein textures, icy edges, and wet reflective surfaces, glowing from within with warm white magical light. Tiny sparkling particles rise from the touched flower, with soft bokeh stars scattered in the dark blue background. Add an elegant translucent lace sleeve along the left edge with glittering threads and a few dangling dew drops, emphasizing an ethereal fairy-tale feeling. Use shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed photoreal macro rendering, high dynamic range highlights, cool moonlit blue atmosphere contrasted with warm radiant light at the fingertip, dreamy volumetric glow, and no readable text except an optional subtle watermark in the bottom right reading Vidu AI.
